# How to contribute to opencode-local-session-manager

## Join the community

- Click 'watch' on the GitHub repo

## Send your suggestions using one of these methods:

- as a [pull request](https://github.com/yaleman/opencode-local-session-manager/pulls)

- as [an issue](https://github.com/yaleman/opencode-local-session-manager/issues/new)

Thanks!
